title: WHL Pack of 2 Hi Vis Wheelie Bin House Numbers Yellow Number 8
features: You will get two of each number you choose
Durable quality weatherproof Hi Vis material.
Self adhesive. Quick and easy to apply. Just peel and stick.
For use with wheelie bins, windows, plastic surfaces, and many more smooth surfaces.
description: Introducing the WHL Pack of 2 Hi Vis Wheelie Bin House Numbers in a vibrant yellow color. Each number is 17cm (6.75in) in height, made of durable and weatherproof material, ensuring long-lasting visibility. This self-adhesive product is easy to apply, just peel and stick, making it convenient for use on wheelie bins, windows, plastic surfaces, and other smooth surfaces. The pack includes two of each number you choose, available in size No. 8. The product is manufactured by WHL, and comes with pre-printed text 'Numbers'. The dimensions of the product are 17cm (length) x 5cm (width) x 0.1cm (depth).
